introSection: Bugs & Bees is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently owned and travelled by German showman Edmund Kaiser. In 2020, it was sold by its previous owner, Martin Hendriks of the Netherlands.
fullText:
Bugs & Bees is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently owned and travelled by German showman Edmund Kaiser. In 2020, it was sold by its previous owner, Martin Hendriks of the Netherlands.






 * Bugs & Bees on polypweb.eu
